levels.title: Learn to Roll
levels.subtitle: Follow the light
levels.feature: A clear table. Learn how the ball responds before the maze fights back.
rules: Place the ball on the blinking cyan start tile.
Follow the yellow route to the magenta finish.
The physical rim keeps the ball on the table.

levels.title: Walls Up
levels.subtitle: The maze takes shape
levels.feature: Green wall tiles rise around the route. Read the maze before you move.
rules: Place the ball on the blinking cyan start tile.
Stay on the yellow route between raised green walls.
Reach the magenta finish before time runs out.

levels.title: Shifting Ground
levels.subtitle: Nothing stays put
levels.feature: Orange pits and selected borders change state while the clock runs.
rules: Place the ball on the blinking cyan start tile.
Green walls block; orange tiles are recessed hazards.
Watch dynamic tiles cycle raised, neutral, then recessed.
